data_maps_VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby_te.VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby_Text_177D6C: I went in through the entrance and\ntook a look around the CONTEST hall.\pGetting up on that big stage...\nIt's going to be tense!
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby_te.VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby_Text_177DEC:
Oh, my love for POKéMON...
The attraction they evoke in me...\pWhoops!
You weren't meant to see that!\lWell, anyway.\pIf you're entering a CONTEST, try this
move on for size.
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby_te.VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby_Text_177E98: My feelings for POKéMON...\nOh, they attract me so...
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby_te.VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby_Text_177ECD:
Which CONTEST are you planning on
entering?\pIf you're entering a COOL CONTEST,
a cool POKéMON has to be the one!\pPick a POKéMON worthy of the CONTEST
theme, and make sure it has the\lright set of moves to match.\pThat's fundamental!
